016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020
021import java.util.*;
022import java.util.function.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.commons.httppart.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.http.part.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
029
030/**
031 * Static factory methods for creating HTTP parts (query parameters, form fields, path variables).
032 *
033 * <p>
034 * Import statically for clean DSL-style usage:
035 * <p class='bjava'>
036 *    import static HttpParts.*;
037 *
038 *    PartList <jv>form</jv> = PartList.<jsm>of</jsm>(
039 *       part(<js>"username"</js>, <js>"alice"</js>),
040 *       part(<js>"password"</js>, <jv>passwordSupplier</jv>)
041 *    );
042 * </p>
043 *
044 * <p>
045 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
046 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
047 * It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the <b>next major</b> Juneau release
048 * (and possibly earlier).
049 *
050 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
051 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
052 * </ul>
053 *
054 * @since 9.2.1
055 */
056public final class HttpParts {
057
058   private HttpParts() {}
059
060   /**
061    * Creates an {@link HttpPart} with an eager string value.
062    *
063    * @param name The part name. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
064    * @param value The part value. May be <jk>null</jk>.
065    * @return A new part. Never <jk>null</jk>.
066    */
067   public static HttpPart part(String name, String value) {
068      return HttpPartBean.of(name, value);
069   }
070
071   /**
072    * Creates an {@link HttpPart} with a lazy value supplier.
073    *
074    * @param name The part name. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
075    * @param valueSupplier Supplier for the value. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
076    * @return A new part. Never <jk>null</jk>.
077    */
078   public static HttpPart part(String name, Supplier<String> valueSupplier) {
079      return HttpPartBean.of(name, valueSupplier);
080   }
081
082   /**
083    * Creates a {@link PartList} from the given parts.
084    *
085    * @param parts The parts. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
086    * @return A new list. Never <jk>null</jk>.
087    */
088   public static PartList partList(HttpPart... parts) {
089      return PartList.of(parts);
090   }
091
092   /**
093    * Creates a {@link PartList} from alternating name/value string pairs.
094    *
095    * @param pairs Alternating name/value strings. Must not be <jk>null</jk>. Length must be even.
096    * @return A new list. Never <jk>null</jk>.
097    */
098   public static PartList partListOfPairs(String... pairs) {
099      return PartList.ofPairs(pairs);
100   }
101
102   private static final Function<ClassMeta<?>,ConstructorInfo> CONSTRUCTOR_FUNCTION =
103      x -> x.getPublicConstructor(y -> y.hasParameterTypes(String.class))
104         .orElseGet(() -> x.getPublicConstructor(y -> y.hasParameterTypes(String.class, String.class)).orElse(null));
105
106   /**
107    * Returns the {@code (String)} or {@code (String,String)} public constructor for the specified type.
108    *
109    * <p>
110    * Used by part-parsing logic to instantiate typed parts from a wire string.
111    *
112    * @param type The type to find the constructor on. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
113    * @return The constructor wrapped in an {@link Optional}; empty if none is found.
114    */
115   public static Optional<ConstructorInfo> getConstructor(ClassMeta<?> type) {
116      return type.getProperty("HttpPart.Constructor", CONSTRUCTOR_FUNCTION);
117   }
118
119   /**
120    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if the specified type is a transport-neutral part type for the given
121    * {@link HttpPartType}.
122    *
123    * <p>
124    * The check is whether the type is assignable to {@link HttpHeader} (for {@code HEADER}) or
125    * {@link HttpPart} (for {@code PATH}, {@code QUERY}, {@code FORMDATA}).
126    *
127    * @param partType The part type. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
128    * @param type The type to check. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
129    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the type is a part type for the given category.
130    */
131   public static boolean isHttpPart(HttpPartType partType, ClassMeta<?> type) {
132      return switch (partType) {
133         case PATH, QUERY, FORMDATA -> type.getProperty("HttpPart.isHttpPart", x -> x.isAssignableTo(HttpPart.class)).orElse(false);
134         case HEADER -> type.getProperty("HttpPart.isHttpHeader", x -> x.isAssignableTo(HttpHeader.class)).orElse(false);
135         default -> false;
136      };
137   }
138
139   private static final Function<ClassMeta<?>,String> HEADER_NAME_FUNCTION = x -> {
140      var n = Holder.<String>empty();
141      x.forEachAnnotation(Header.class, y -> ine(y.value()), y -> n.set(y.value()));
142      x.forEachAnnotation(Header.class, y -> ine(y.name()), y -> n.set(y.name()));
143      if (n.isEmpty())
144         n.set(readPublicStaticStringField(x.inner(), "NAME"));
145      return n.orElse(null);
146   };
147
148   private static final Function<ClassMeta<?>,String> QUERY_NAME_FUNCTION = x -> {
149      var n = Holder.<String>empty();
150      x.forEachAnnotation(Query.class, y -> ine(y.value()), y -> n.set(y.value()));
151      x.forEachAnnotation(Query.class, y -> ine(y.name()), y -> n.set(y.name()));
152      if (n.isEmpty())
153         n.set(readPublicStaticStringField(x.inner(), "NAME"));
154      return n.orElse(null);
155   };
156
157   private static final Function<ClassMeta<?>,String> FORMDATA_NAME_FUNCTION = x -> {
158      var n = Holder.<String>empty();
159      x.forEachAnnotation(FormData.class, y -> ine(y.value()), y -> n.set(y.value()));
160      x.forEachAnnotation(FormData.class, y -> ine(y.name()), y -> n.set(y.name()));
161      if (n.isEmpty())
162         n.set(readPublicStaticStringField(x.inner(), "NAME"));
163      return n.orElse(null);
164   };
165
166   private static final Function<ClassMeta<?>,String> PATH_NAME_FUNCTION = x -> {
167      var n = Holder.<String>empty();
168      x.forEachAnnotation(Path.class, y -> ine(y.value()), y -> n.set(y.value()));
169      x.forEachAnnotation(Path.class, y -> ine(y.name()), y -> n.set(y.name()));
170      if (n.isEmpty())
171         n.set(readPublicStaticStringField(x.inner(), "NAME"));
172      return n.orElse(null);
173   };
174
175   private static String readPublicStaticStringField(Class<?> c, String fieldName) {
176      try {
177         var f = c.getField(fieldName);
178         if (java.lang.reflect.Modifier.isStatic(f.getModifiers()) && f.getType() == String.class) {
179            var v = f.get(null);
180            return v == null ? null : v.toString();
181         }
182      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") ReflectiveOperationException ignored) {
183         // Field does not exist or is not accessible.
184      }
185      return null;
186   }
187
188   /**
189    * Returns the name of the specified part type by reading the {@code @Header}, {@code @Query},
190    * {@code @FormData}, or {@code @Path} annotation on the class.
191    *
192    * @param partType The part type. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
193    * @param type The type to check. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
194    * @return The part name, wrapped in an {@link Optional}.
195    */
196   public static Optional<String> getName(HttpPartType partType, ClassMeta<?> type) {
197      return switch (partType) {
198         case FORMDATA -> type.getProperty("HttpPart.formData.name", FORMDATA_NAME_FUNCTION);
199         case HEADER -> type.getProperty("HttpPart.header.name", HEADER_NAME_FUNCTION);
200         case PATH -> type.getProperty("HttpPart.path.name", PATH_NAME_FUNCTION);
201         case QUERY -> type.getProperty("HttpPart.query.name", QUERY_NAME_FUNCTION);
202         default -> oe();
203      };
204   }
205}
